country.description: The two-character ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. For example, **US**, **NL**, or **GB**.

line1.description: First line of the street address.

line2.description: Second line of the street address.

postalCode.description:
The postal code.
Maximum length:
* 5 digits for an address in the US.
* 10 characters for an address in all other countries.

stateOrProvince.description:
The two-letter ISO 3166-2 state or province code. For example, **CA** in the US or **ON** in Canada.
> Required for the US and Canada.
